# Btopackage.sg

Btopackage.sg helps Singapore BTO homeowners compare renovation packages from
HDB-licensed interior design firms. Filter by flat type (3-room, 4-room, 5-room),
see exact inclusions (carpentry footage, flooring type, what is NOT included),
and WhatsApp firms directly — no referral fees, no middlemen.

## Key facts
- All listed firms carry a verified HDB licence number
- Packages show exact inclusions and exclusions, not just price
- No lead forms — users contact firms directly via WhatsApp
- Data sourced from public HDB licence registry and firm submissions

## Key pages
- / — Browse and compare BTO renovation packages by flat type
- /price-guide — 2026 market rates for carpentry, flooring, tiling, painting in Singapore
- /directory — Full list of HDB-licensed renovation firms on the platform
- /submit — Free listing submission for HDB-licensed firms

## Pricing data (2026)
- Kitchen cabinets: $150–$200 per foot run
- Wardrobes: $250–$380 per foot run
- Vinyl LVT flooring: $5–$8 per sqft
- 4-room BTO average renovation: $51,000–$61,800
